titleStmt.title: SII 9.158: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 158. (A.R. No. 128 of 1913.) ON A SLAB SET UP AT THE WESTERN ENTRANCE INTO THE KESAVASVAMI TEMPLE AT HUVINA-HADAGALLI, HADAGALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a composite record of several gifts made on different dates and is damaged. The first grant is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 15, Pramōda, Āśvīja-amāvāsye, Ādivāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, Vyatīpāta. In Pramōda, Āśvīja amāvāsyā was not a Sunday nor was it a day of a solar eclipse. In Kārttika of the year, however, there was a solar eclipse and it fell on a Sunday = A.D. 1090 November 24. This was probably the intended date. It was not, however, a day of Uttarāyana-saṅkrānti. The grant refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and mentions his feudatory the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Tribhuvanamalla-Pāṇḍyadēva as ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand. It records that Rebbaladēvī, wife of the brave Brāhman general Ravidēva or Raviga caused the construction of the temple of Kēśavadēva in Pūvina-Posavaḍaṅgile, which was her birth-place and having set up the god in the temple, made grants of many plots of land for the service of the god and for maintaining a feeding house for Brāhmans, a flower garden and a house for the satra, in the presence of the Brāhman Mahājanas of the place. The general Raviga is stated to have had such royal honours as a white umbrella, chāmara, pāvuḍambara and kurulakonta. He is described as an unrivalled commander and Sandhivigrahin and as having made the orders of the king obeyed by all between the Himālayas and the Sētu and as Chālukyarājya-mūlasthambha. He is said to have established his charities on the banks of the Narmadā, the Ganges, and the Jumna and to have set up sañjamaṇḍapa and satras throughout the land. His genealogy as well as that of his wife are also given. The record has poetical merit. The second record states that, at the request of Raviyaṇa-Bhaṭṭa (Raviga), the king made a gift of the village Urchulāgēri for the service of the same god in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 17, Āṅgirasa, Vaiśākha, śu. 3, Sōmavāra corresponding to A.D. 1092 April 12, Monday. The third records that a certain Raykeya-Shaṇaṅgi of Vasishṭha-gōtra made a gift of 3 gadyāṇas in the Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 50, Viśvāvasu, Banada-puṇṇami, Sōmavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1126 January 11 Monday. Sōrikayve, daughter of Sayaṇṇa, son of Lōkeya-Shanaṅgi, made a gift of 600 kammas of wet land for the service of the god in Chālukya-Vikrama year 53, Kilaka, Kārtika, pūrṇamāsye, Bṛihaspativāra, Kṛittikā, Sōma-grahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1128 November 8, Thursday when there was a lunar eclipse.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cicaṁdracā
ḷastaṁbhāya
mastabhuvanāśraya prithvīvallabha mahārā rājya
rābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ
śabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara kuḷuṁbapuravarēśvaraṁ yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍā vanamalla
mādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ tribhuvanamallapāṇḍyadēvarnnoḷaṁbavāḍi mūvatticchāsiramumaṁ māsavāḍi nūṟanālvattumanāḷuttamire .
śrīgadāpāṇīsvarābhimataphaḷōdayaniyatavyāpāranosedu ravigacamūpaṁgutsava māḷke kēśavadēva . v® . tudiyoḷpattire dhātri dakṣiṇaradāgrabījavaṁ pottu vilasatkīrtilatāṁ
gāspadamādādivarāhamūrtti bhuvanārādhyaṁ surārātisammadasammarddi janārddhanaṁ ravicamūpaṁgīgabhīṣṭārtthamaṁ . vārijapīṭhamakṣavaḷayaṁ maṇikuṇḍaḷamullasattrivēdīravaveṁbīvādame kaṭītaṭadoḷkaradoḷ
sahajamāgire nīrajanābhanābhinīrēruhagarbhadiṁdamogedaṁ vijitārkkamahaṁ pitāmaha . Ā negaḻda padmayōnige mānasabhavanādanagranandananamalajñānamayaṁ suramunisantānasamabhyarcitāmara
tanayanādanasāmānyaguṇāṁburāsi kaśyapamunipaṁ tāmarasōdbhavanibhanuddāmayaśaṟprasaranirmaḷīkṛtabhuvana . Ese negaḻda muniya vaṁśadoḷanupamasāmartthyadakhiḷavēdārtthamahā
yisi negaḻdarvvasundharāmaramukhyar . Ā vaṁśadoḷudiyisidaṁ bhūvaṁditanakhiḷavēdavēdārtthavidaṁ śrīvadhugaṁ sakaḷavacaśśrīvadhugamadhīśanenipa śaṁkarabhaṭṭa . Ā vibhuvanēkayajñakṛtāvabhṛta
bhrāvaḷimiṣadiṁ negedu nabhōvaḷayadoḷinnumirdda dhūmastōmaṁ . Enisida mahānubhāvaṁ tanayārtthaṁ koppadhīśanaṁ bahuvidhadarccaneyiṁdarccisi paḍedaṁ manunibhanaṁ koppaṇanaṁdananaṁ tadvaradi . Ā vibhuvaśēṣavidyā
danucitamē nīḷagrīvavaradiṁdamogedaṁgāvudu vismayamotāḷdidaṁ pratibhāna . Ā sarasati vimaḷaguṇōpēte dayānvite patihitavrate dharaṇījāte jagadēkamāte vinītōttame paṁpakabbe peṁpina niḷaye
nādaṁ śrīvāvaṇayyanamaḷayaśassaṁchāditagaganaṁ vāgvanitādayitaṁ gaṇakara taṭīmāṇikyaṁ . tadanujanaśēṣavidyāsadana vibhuśaṁkarāryyanātana tammaṁ viditasakaḷāgamārtthaṁ sadamaḷata
ṭṭaṁ . Ātana tammaṁ vinayavinūtaṁ caṁdrātatāvadātayaśassaṁghātaṁ samastavidyānvitaśrutyartthavēdi māceyabhaṭṭa . Ā nālvariṁda kiṟiyaṁ śrīniḷayaṁ śastraśāstrasāhityakaḷājñānanidhi sakaḷavi
maṇḍanaṁ ravidēva . guṇagaṇavanituṁ maṇibhūśaṇadante tadaṁgasaṁgadoḷoppidavolphaṇidīptiśōṇamaṇi doḷkīlisi beḍaṁguvaḍevantetta . Āḷōcisa ravigacamūpāḷaṁgācandratāramāgire koṭṭa trai
jitaripupāḷa sa(ṁ)ndhivi grahipadamaṁ . Adu modalāgire saṁtatamuditōditanāgi patiya siṁhāsanamaṁ paduḷaṁmāḍida ravigaṁ tridaśādhipamaṁtrigaṁ padirmmaḍi piriyaṁ . v® . Ahitōrvvīpatigaḷge vigra
nirggamagrahamābāndhavakōṭigutsavamanīyuttuṁ nṛpaṁ śrīvarōdvahanene raviga sahiṣṇu jiṣṇu jagamaṁ tāḻditele sa(ṁ)ndhivigrahiratnaṁ ravidaṇḍanāthana mahāmaṁtraprabhāvōdayaṁ Ātmajana
rddiḻda svāśrita kkaredartthisaṁkuḷake pārāvāramuṁ rudra kaḷpamahījamuṁ surabhiyuṁ tāneṁbinaṁ kīrttigāgaramādaṁ ravidaṇḍanāyakanaśēṣānana bhavanaṁ sura
vāhiniya ghanamārggamoppuvaṁtire vīravikramādityarāḷeyakaṁ karamoppidattosākṣīranidhi saṁdhivigrahiśirōmaṇiyiṁ ravidaṇḍanāthaniṁ Ā mahīmaṇḍaḷa dbhavaroḷge
ḷānta janaviśvanutaṁ ravidaṇḍanāyakaṁ śrīmadiḷēśaniyōgadinda taḷedaṁ beḷgoḍe mahāḍaṁbaraṁ cāmaramorjjharaṁ kuruḷakontamenippa mahīśacinhamaṁ . Oṭṭajavettu bāhubaladiṁdōḍi nirmmaḷa ntiyādiṭṭaḷa
yināḷdana cittavṛttiyaṁ neṭṭane gelda bhūpatisabhāntaradoḷpeṟatēno kūrttu tāṁkoṭṭaḍe koḍu biṭṭaḍade biḍenipa ravidaṇḍanāyaka . tannavolī vasundhareyoḷatyupakārigaḷatyudāraratyunnatanatyudāttanayaratyamaḷa
ḷupāyasaṁpannaradāro pēḷenisidaṁ jagake ravidaṇḍanāyakaṁ pannagavairivikramanapāraguṇaṁ jagadēkabāndhavaṁ . ka . cāḷukyarājarājyada mūḷaṁ tānenisi maṁtravikramabhūpāḷa sētuviṁ himaśaiḷaba
rccidaṁ bhūtaḷamaṁ . vikramacakrige nijamaṁtrakramadiṁdotti tandu kaḍitakke dharācakramanērisidatuḷaparākramamēdōrito ravigadaṇḍādhipanaṁ māḷavavēḷuma neṟe nirmmūḷisi nijanāthanājñeyaṁ lā
nṛpāḷana neleyoḷu sumanōmāḷikeyaṁ nilisuvante nilisidanadaṭaṁ . Āvaṟidiṟde vinnēvaravintinitaṁ ravidēvanoldu saṁbhāvaneyinde māḍisida saṁjemaṭaṁ prapegōpracāra viśāvasatha murāribhavana dvijasatrami
ntire nānāvidhadharmmamilladeḍeyilla dharitriyoḷelli nōḷpoḍaṁ . narmmade dēvasindhuyamunānadiyeṁbivu mukhyavāge satkarmmanivāsamādamaḷatīrtthataṭaṁgaḷoḷellamoldu tāṁ nirmmisidaṁ surāyatanamaṁ palavaṁ
nāyakaṁ dharmmavinōdi nirmmaḷayaśōnidhi dhārmmikadharmmanandanaṁ . Ene negaḻda puṇyamūrttige vinayada mane dayeyamēre dharmada kaṇi mūntanada tavaraṟitadeṟevaṭṭenipoḷpina rebbaṇabbe vallabheyādaḷ . sati rebba
yāgalu pati vikramarāya cakriyoseyalu kṛtakṛtyano kāryyabṛhaspatiyenisida dharege ravigadaṇḍādhīśaṁ . manucāritranenippa sadguṇikumārasvāmigaṁ puṇyabhājane gojjāmbikegaṁ va
vutsavade lakṣmīdēvivolpuṭṭi viṣṇunibhaṁ śrīravidaṇḍanāthana viśāḷōrasthaḷasthāyiyādanavadyāṁgige rebbaṇabbegeṇeyārvviśvaṁbharābhāgadoḷ . dore sumanege śāṇḍilyege sale sītege pāṭi sandarundhatigeṇe sacca rita
patibhaktiya pariṇatiyodavendoḍuḷidarā vadhugeṇeye . v® . hariya viśāḷavakṣamanaḷaṁkarisiṟda sarōjavāsigaṁ giriśana dēhabhāgamanaḷankarisiṟda nagātmajātegaṁ surapatiyaṁkapīṭhamanaḷaṁkarisiṟda
ḷāruputrigaṁ dore ravidaṇḍanāthana manaṟpriye rebbaladēvi peṁpinoḷ . gadya . svasti śrīravicamūnāthavakṣasthaḷasaṁyōgini Agaṇyapuṇyabhāgini patihitavratārundhati dānaguṇapaddhati saubhāgyaguṇārddhanā
rmmagajanāri pratibhāsaraśvati nirmmaḷayaśasvati girijācaraṇamaṇituḷākōṭi lāvaṇyakusumavāṭi ravidēvabhujastaṁbhayaṣṭi dvijadēvatuṣṭi pratiṣṭitamaṇiputrike . saukumā
ryyaśatapatrike . satyapratapatāke nijēśanayanakarppūraśaḷākhe . guṇarōhaṇamaṇisānu . parijana dayācitratūḷike . cāturyya kaḷike . dhairyyaguṇadharaṇi patibhaktiśaraṇi nijapatima
nabhṛṁgayūthe sadācāravīthi Adharmmagranthisūci . vaidagdhīvīci parahitapraguṇitakandhare dharmmadhurandhare rūpanirjjitaratipatinitaṁbini mānāvaḷaṁbini kuḷāṁganājanōttame saundaryyatiḷōttame
Adabhravibhramābhirāme Upaśamasīme ravivasaṁtōnmiṣitanavamāḷike . tiraskṛtājñānakāḷike . mṛdumadhuravādini . gurujanāhlādini . vāṇikarakaḷitavīṇe . sakaḷakaḷāpravīṇe . tyāgakaḷpadru
maśākhe . suhṛtkumidinīsudhāṁśulēkhe pārvvatīpadapadmabhṛṁgi Abhaṁguraśṛṁgārabhaṁgi Enisidaṁkamāle tanaganvartthamādā mahānubhāveya vaṁśamede yene . kaṁ . śrīvatsaneṁba riṣiya mahāvaṁśado
ḷogedu gōtramaṁḍananāda śrīvatsapadapavitritabhāvaṁ yōgīśvaraṁ caturvvēdavidaṁ Adhigatasamastaśāstraṁ vidyāviśadayaśōvibhāsīkṛtanikhiḷamakhaṁ madhumardanapadapayōruhamadhukaranu
ddhūtakaḷikaḷaṁkaprasaraṁ . Enisida mahānubhāvana tanayaṁ vinayāspadaṁ catu mārggadinapananupamananavadyaṁ rudrabhaṭṭanakhiḷōtkṛṣṭaṁ . sakalaśrutiguruvenisiḻdakaḷaṁkaṁgā dvijō
ttamaṁgogetandaṁ vikaḷitaduritaughaṁ dvēdikumārasvāmināmadhēyanajēyaṁ . Ā vibhuvinagranandananāviskṛtakīrtti bhaṭṭayōgēśvaranantāviprōttamananujaṁ bhūviśrutanakhiḷavēdi śaṁka
rabhaṭṭaṁ . Avanoḍane puṭṭidaḷu bhūbhuvanārccite ravicamūpanarddhāṁgi kavipravaranute rebbāṁbike vividhaguṇādhāre negaḷdavanītaḷadoḷ . negaṟdeḻda teṁkanāḍoḷu bagegoḷisuva pūganāgavallīvanadiṁ
sogayisuva paḍaṁgile vipragaṇāspadamāge tanage janmasthānaṁ . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīḷaguṇasaṁpannar sujanaprasannar caturvvēdō
ccāritaghōṣadaśadigparighārṇitacaturmmukhar duḥkarmmaparānmukhar dēvariṣipitṛtarppaṇādivividhahavyakavyaprayōgayōjitar . dvātriṁśatsahasrārgghyāgrapūjitar sakaḷaśāstrapā
rāvāratīraprāptamanōbahitrar dvijakuḷapavitrar saptasōmasaṁsthāvabhṛthāvagāhanaparamapavitrīkṛtaśarīrar bhayalōbhadūrar yajanayājanādhyayanādiṣaṭkarmmaniratar kṛtayugacari
trar Aghakuḷāndhakārādityar . ttraipuruṣabhṛtyar . sakaḷaguṇābharaṇabhūṣitar satyārjjitasubhāṣitar . Āśṛtajanakalpavakṣar . sakaḷadēvāsura kōpaprasādalabdhaprakṛtisāpānugrahasama
rtthar . satpuruṣatīrtthar . pratyēkakāryyabṛhaspatisadṛsar . dāyavācaspatigaḷ ripukuḷakadaḷīvanakuṁjarar . śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjarar . sakaḷajanāhlādigaḷ dānavinōdigaḷ śrīkalidēvasvāmilabdhava
raprasādarumappa śrīmadagrahāraṁ pūvinapaṁḍaṁgileyūroḍeyapramukhamahājanaṁ nūṟirppadiṁbara peṁpeṁtendoḍe . kaṁ . sāradirittalu muḷidaḍe mārigaḷī pārvvareṁdu kaliyaṁ dēvāgārada paḷayige dūrade bā
gisuvantirkumalli vātōddhūtaṁ . kaliyavara sīmeyaṁ meṭṭalu volla poṟage peṟci hōmada poge suttalumire kōṭivoladu tanagalaṁghyameṁboṁdu bageyinā vēḷkuṁ . v® . Ā negaṟdiḻda pūvinapaḍaṁgileyoḷpiridenipa bhaktiyiṁ
dānavinōde dharmmada tavarmmane rebbaladēvi śōbheyuddāniyu nāntu kaṇgeseye kēśavagēhamaniṣṭaśiṣṭasantānamanārataṁ pogaḷe māḍisidaḷ bhuvanaikavandyamaṁ . vikramavarṣaṁ padinaydu kramadiṁ varttise pramōdā
bdadoḷā cakrāyudhaṁge dharaṇīcakrastutabhūribhaktibhāvaneyindaṁ . Ā vatsaradāśvayujada tīvidamāvāsyeyādivāradoḷesadattāvaga sūryyagrahaṇaṁ kēvaḷamaltuttarāyaṇaṁ vyatīpātaṁ . kaḷaveyaṁ gaḻdeyuṁ
gaṇgoḷipaḍakeya taḷtabanamumaṁ tadviprāḷiyosedu tanage guḍalā jaḷaruhanābhaṁge goṭṭaḷavanutsavadiṁ . baḍagaṇa tōṁṭada kammaṁkaḍeyoḷu mūvattu verasidaṟunūṟalliṁ paḍuvaṇa baḍagaṇa kōṇoḷgaḍiṁbadi
rmmattariḻdagaḻdeya mānaṁ . nānādēśadvijasantānada satrakke teṁkapoladoḷkoṭṭaḷdānavinōde gaḍiṁbada mānadinirppattumattaraṁ mēdiniyaṁ . Aḍakeya tōṁṭada gaṟdeya naḍuvaṇa nīrvvariya baḍagaṇada pūdōṁṭaṁ gaḍiṁbadoḷa
doṁde mattarppoḍaviyoḷenetanitu puṟpajātiyinesaguṁ . Ī viśadadharmmamākaḷpāvadhi nirvvyādhavāgi nilke dharitrīpāvanarenisida nirmmaḷabhāvara nūṟirppadiṁbarāśīśśaradiṁ . Aṁtu śrīkēśavadēvargge Ūroḍayapramu
khamahājana nūṟirppadiṁbaruṁ śrīmaddaṇḍanāyakitti rebbaladēviyarumiṟdu caṁddrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ sarbbabādhāparihāramāgi biṭṭa dharmmamāvuvendaḍe kaṭṭeya keḷagaṇaḍakedōṁṭada kamma 630 bhujabalaga
ṭṭeya keḷage gaṟde mattar 2 teṁka bāḷguḻiya baṭṭeyiṁ mūḍalūroḍeyara mānyadoḷage satrakke biṭṭa Ereya keyi mattar 2 Ā satrakke mane 1 dēvargge pūvinatōṁṭaṁ mattar 1 Iṁtī dharmmamanolpōraṁtire rakṣi
pa puṇyamūrttige dēvēśaṁ tāne dayeyinīguvananantasukhāspadamanātmalōkasthitiyaṁ . Idu saddharmmanivāsamintidaghasaṁghōnmūḷanasthānamintidu puṇyaikanikētamintidu samastōrvvījanastutyamintidu
sākṣājjagadēkapāvanamidaṁ kaykoṇḍu kādaṁ manōmudadiṁ vaiṣṇavalōkadoḷ ramiyikkuṁ caṁdārkkatāraṁbaraṁ . dēvargge mānyaṁ tuḍike 1 Ī dharmmakkēnānuṁ bādheyanoḍarisida pātakaṁ
puguguṁ nissādhāraṇōgraduḥkhamayādhōbhuvanavanatīva dustarataramaṁ . ślōka svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēttu vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhivarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturṇnripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētāṁbhāvinaḥ pārtthivēndrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . mattaṁ kēśavadēvara dēvālaya
da khaṇḍasphuṭitanavakarmmakkaṁ dēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ pādamūlaparihārakkavāgi śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 17 neya Āṁgirasasaṁvatsarada vaiśākha suddha 3 sōmavāradandina
yugādiparvvanimittaṁ viśvacakraṁ modalāgi palavuṁ mahādānaṁgaḷaṁ nirvvarttisuvalliya dakṣiṇakāladoḷ daṇḍanāyakaṁ raviyaṇabhaṭṭara binnapadā rājā
śrayada nelevīḍinalu śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvaru dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi tribhōgābhyana rasiddhiyiṁ sarvvanamasyadēvabhōgaṁ biṭṭa māsavāḍi nūḻanālvattaṟa baḷiya
ppa Urcculagēri Ondu Adaṟa catussīmeyaṁ pūrvvamaryādeyindiḻdaṁ . © madvaṁśajāḥ paramahīpativaṁśajā vā pāpādapētamanasō bhuvi bhāvibhūpāḥ . yē
pāḷayanti mama dharmmamimaṁ samastaṁ tēbhyōmayā vinamitāṁjaḷirēṣa mūrdhni . śrīmat kumārasvāmidvēdiyara magaṁ raviyaṇnagaḷu śrīkēśava
rggesauparṇna taṁbulakkaṁ gandhakkaṁ biṭṭa gadyāṇa 6 . śrīmanmahāsāmantagaruḍaṁ ṭṭūraghaṭṭiyarasaru śrīkēśavadēvaraṁgabhōgada ṇṭakke tamma manneya
da manevaṇadoḷage varṣamprati biṭṭa gadyāṇa 1 © śrīmatu sābali bammimayyana peṇḍatiyarasikabbe śrīkēśavadēvargge nivēdyaṁ soḍareṇne pū takkaṁ poṁge varṣakippaṇa vaḍḍi
yalu biṭṭa gadyāṇaṁ . śrīmat dīrgghavāviya vaśiṣṭagōtrada mādhava śrīkēśavadēvargge nandādīvigege biṭṭa lokkigadyāṇa 1 śrīmatu huḷiyamayyaṁgaḷa Aḷiyaṁ kukkanūra vaśiṣṭa
gōtrada raykeyaṣaNaṁgiyaru śrīkēśavadēvara caitrada pūjege 50 neya viśvāvasu saṁvatsarada banada puṇnami sōmavāradaṁdu poṁge varṣakkippaṇa vṛddhiyoḷ biṭṭa gadyāṇa 3 maṁgaḷa mahāśrī .
śrīmatu kāsyapagōtrada gavaniya Īcamayyaṁgaḷa magaṁ hiriyanāṇimayyaṁgaḷu śrīkēśavadēvargge caitrada pūjeya varṣaṁprati Akṣayataitīyaamāvāśyeyalu māḍuvaṁtāgi varṣakke poṁgippa
ṇa vriddhiyoḷ biṭṭa gadyāṇa 2 pa 6 mattaAvaraśrīmatu kāśyapagōtrada māhimayyaṁ gaḷa maga nāṇimayyaṁgaḷa brāhmaṇi cākiyakkaṁgaḷu śrīkēśavadēvargge caitrada pūjeyaṁ varṣaṁprati mā
ḍuvaṁtāgi poṁge varṣakkippaṇa vṛddhiyoḷu biṭṭa gadyāṇa 2 pa 50 śrīmatu kumārasvāmidvēdiyara mage raviyaṇaṁgaḷa brāhmaṇi sōrikayvegaḷu tammayyaṁ lōkeyaṣaṇaṁgiyara maga sa
yaṇnagaḷu Agniya brāhmaṇara sannidhānadalu kanyādānadoḍate bhūmidānavāgi koṭṭa 600 kamma gaddeyaṁ 53 neya kīlakasaṁvatsarada kārtika pūrṇnamāsya brihaspativāra krittikenakṣatra sō
magrahaṇadaṁdu Ā gaddeya sōrikayve śrikēśavadēvarggaṁgabhōgakke biṭṭaḷu . mattadā tithiyoḷ lukkiguṁḍiya cāvu(ṁ)ṇḍayyakravintara magaḷ Arasiyakkaṁgaḷ
śrīkēśavadēvara caitrapūjegavalliya bhōjanakkaṁ poṁge variṣakkirppaṇa vriddhiyoḷ biṭṭa gadyāṇa 3 .
Digital edition of SII 9.158 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
